zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory於0947年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼時，他的父親Doncadh, King of Leinster28歲，母親Aife Ingen Faelain32歲。他於大約0965年與Echrad ingen Carlus在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於0996年在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory于0947年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼时，他的父亲Doncadh, King of Leinster28岁，母亲Aife Ingen Faelain32岁。他于大约0965年与Echrad ingen Carlus在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于0996年在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Donnchad
meanings: Gaelic: The Gaelic original of Duncan, the brown-haired dog, figuratively brown-haired warrior.

variants.name: Donnach
meanings: Gaelic: The Gaelic original of Duncan, the brown-haired dog, figuratively brown-haired warrior.

nameMeanings.name: Gilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Priscilla  , associated chiefly with the Liverpudlian singer and TV personality  Cilla Black  (  b. 1943 ), whose real name is  Priscilla White .

nameMeanings.name: Patraic
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Pádraig  , current in Connacht.

variants.name: Patrick
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory was born in 0947, in County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, Doncadh, King of Leinster, was 28 and his mother, Aife Ingen Faelain, was 32. He married Echrad ingen Carlus about 0965, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 0996, in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory est né en 0947, à County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, Doncadh, King of Leinster, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Aife Ingen Faelain, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Echrad ingen Carlus environ 0965, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 0996, à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory 0947 in County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Doncadh, King of Leinster 28 und seine Mutter Aife Ingen Faelain 32. Er hat um 0965 in Irland Echrad ingen Carlus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 0996 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory è nato il nel 0947 nel County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, Doncadh, King of Leinster, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Aife Ingen Faelain, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Echrad ingen Carlus circa 0965, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 0996, nel Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossoryが0947年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーで生まれた時，父Doncadh, King of Leinsterは28歳，母Aife Ingen Faelainは32歳であった。約0965年にアイルランドでEchrad ingen Carlusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は0996年にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory(이)가 0947년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Doncadh, King of Leinster(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Aife Ingen Faelain(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 0965년 아일랜드에서 Echrad ingen Carlus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0996년 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory nasceu em 0947, em County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, Doncadh, King of Leinster, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Aife Ingen Faelain, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Echrad ingen Carlus aproximadamente 0965, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 0996, em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory родился в 0947 г. в местности коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Doncadh, King of Leinster было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Aife Ingen Faelain, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Echrad ingen Carlus около 0965 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 0996 г. в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 49 лет.

sm.from 0976 to 0996: mai le 0976 e o'o I le 0996

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilla Patraic mac Donnchad King of Ossory nació en 0947, en County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, Doncadh, King of Leinster, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Aife Ingen Faelain, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Echrad ingen Carlus aproximadamente 0965, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 0996, en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 49 años.
